footer.v: 1 - Còn sử dụng, 0 - Không còn sử dụng

dir.commands: &UnitListFormShowing; select 'active$FormUnit(this);' as message return select 'close$FormUnit(this);' as message return declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$updateConflict nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512), @$deleteConflict nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã đơn vị %s đã có hoặc lồng nhau trong danh mục đơn vị cơ sở.' else N'The unit %s is invalid or already exists.' end select @$updateConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã đơn vị %s đã phát sinh, không thể sửa được.' else N'Cannot edit the unit %s. It has already been used.' end select @$deleteConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã đơn vị %s đã phát sinh, không thể xóa được.' else N'Cannot delete the unit %s. It has already been used.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã đơn vị %s đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'The unit %s has been modified or deleted by another user.' end if exists(select * from @@table where ((ma_dvcs like rtrim(@ma_dvcs) + '%') or rtrim(@ma_dvcs) like rtrim(ma_dvcs) + '%')) begin select 'ma_dvcs' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_dvcs)) as message return end select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID &Control.Unit.Inserted; if not exists(select * from @@table where ma_dvcs = $ma_dvcs.OldValue) begin select 'ma_dvcs' as field, replace(@$recordHasBeenChanged, '%s', rtrim($ma_dvcs.OldValue)) as message return end if @ma_dvcs <> $ma_dvcs.OldValue begin if exists(select * from @@table where ((ma_dvcs like rtrim(@ma_dvcs) + '%') or rtrim(@ma_dvcs) like rtrim(ma_dvcs) + '%') and ma_dvcs <> $ma_dvcs.OldValue) begin select 'ma_dvcs' as field, replace(@$exists, '%s', rtrim(@ma_dvcs)) as message return end declare @message nvarchar(255) select @message = replace(@$updateConflict, '%s', rtrim($ma_dvcs.OldValue)) if exists(select 1 from ct00 where ma_dvcs = $ma_dvcs.OldValue) begin select 'ma_dvcs' as field, @message as message return end if exists(select 1 from cdtk where ma_dvcs = $ma_dvcs.OldValue) begin select 'ma_dvcs' as field, @message as message return end if exists(select 1 from cdkh where ma_dvcs = $ma_dvcs.OldValue) begin select 'ma_dvcs' as field, @message as message return end if exists(select 1 from cdvt a join dmkho b on a.ma_kho = b.ma_kho where b.ma_dvcs = $ma_dvcs.OldValue) begin select 'ma_dvcs' as field, @message as message return end end update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where ma_dvcs = @ma_dvcs declare @message nvarchar(255) select @message = replace(@$deleteConflict, '%s', rtrim(@ma_dvcs)) if exists(select 1 from ct00 where ma_dvcs = @ma_dvcs) begin select @message as message return end if exists(select 1 from cdtk where ma_dvcs = @ma_dvcs) begin select @message as message return end if exists(select 1 from cdkh where ma_dvcs = @ma_dvcs) begin select @message as message return end if exists(select 1 from cdvt a join dmkho b on a.ma_kho = b.ma_kho where b.ma_dvcs = @ma_dvcs) begin select @message as message return end
